title: Integrated Cobblemon
body:
# FOR NEOFORGE 1.21

**Required Mods:**
- Integrated API
- Create
- Supplementaries
- Quark
- Cobblemon
- Radical Cobblemon Trainers


Optionally Integrated Mods:
- Farmer's Delight


## **WHAT IS INTEGRATED COBBLEMON?**

    Integrated Cobblemon is the fifth mod in the Integrated Structures series. Not only does it add detailed Cobblemon gyms with puzzles and Gym Leaders to fight, but it integrates Supplementaries/Quark decorations and Create mod doors, puzzles, traps, and more. I got sick of installing structure mods into a pack and roaming the world, only to find vanilla items and nothing of difficulty anywhere. I love detailed builds and Create machines, so I decided to make mods that adds exactly what I’ve been missing. When I saw there weren't many Cobblemon structure mods I decided I had to make this mod as a Cobblemon and Pokemon fan. 


### Check out my other projects!

Integrated Minecraft, the official modpack for the Integrated Structures series
Integrated Cataclysm
Integrated Simply Swords
Integrated Villages
Integrated Stronghold
Integrated Dungeons and Structures (IDAS)

Want to make your own structure mods? See what [https://github.com/craisinlord/integrated-api.github.io](https://github.com/craisinlord/integrated-api.github.io) can help you with

### Configuration and optional Integration:

To configure anything, download this datapack- https://curseforge.com/minecraft/data-packs/integrated-cobblemon-config

To change spawn rates change the spacing and separation in the structures sets. Spacing is the Average distance between two neighboring generation attempts. Value between 0 and 4096
Separation is the Minimum distance in chunks between two neighboring attempts. Value between 0 and 4096. Can't be bigger than spacing

To edit biomes, edit the biome files in tags/worldgen/biome/has structure

To disable structures, remove the structures from the structure set file

To improve compatibility with other structure mods, add structure SETS to the “structure set to avoid” list in each of the tags/worldgen/structure_set files


To edit trainers, find the trainers folder under rctmod.


### Features and Planned features:

18 detailed Cobblemon gyms and 3 Pokecenters!

Legendary Pokemon Structures are planned along with more Pokecenters

Join my discrd to make suggestions and vote on what structures get added next!



### Frequently Asked Questions:

Q: What biome mods are compatible?

A: Most biome mods are compatible and integrated including Terralith, BOP, BGW, and Regions Unexplored.

Q: Will you backport/update to ___?

A: I will always keep the mod up to date with the newest versions of Minecraft as the dependencies update. 


Q: Does this mod work with other structures mods?

A: Yes.

 
Q: Can I use this mod in a modpack?

A: Yes! I would love it if this mod gets used in packs.


Q: Can this mod be only on the server-side?
A: Yes!



I’ve spent over 5000 hours on my mods. I learned Java specifically for this.
